highlights.text: I wrote last Friday Friday December 20th: “My general lean is that ES can make its way up to the back-test of 6099”.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into one of the questions I get most often especially pertaining to my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.

post_title: Will The Holiday Crash In SPX Get Sustainably Bought? Dec 30 Plan
